We are now going to do 2 last UX fixes, first the "contributors" chart int he project details page has older and hence different format thatn the other charts in the whole app, legend is still underneath not on the right and X-axis labels is still overlapping, make sure this chart follows the guidlines and formats of all other charts too 
[Image: image/png]

Next change is that in charts where we have a dimensional split like this one , I want to sort the legend by value desc so whatever has more values/frequency from the split should be at the top, not sure what the sorting of the legend is right now but at the top we shoould have the value with thi highest frequency and at the bottom the opposiute
[Image: image/png]

task: Something weird is happening. When I change metrics in these charts the color changes in the legend items. This should not happen! Let's revert thic change completely. I think this needs more though because you can pick a metric then another one and this will change the sorting. Let's revert it pleae.
